pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 24 creates customer Alice Williams with this email if missing; export_result.sh line 17 queries for this email
setup_magento.sh line 283 creates product with this SKU via REST API
task.json specification; verifier.py line 72 expects qty 2.0
setup_magento.sh line 283 creates HEADPHONES-001 with price 149.99
setup_magento.sh line 287 creates product LED Desk Lamp with this SKU via REST API

Magento standard shipping method code for Flat Rate; verifier.py line 116 comment indicates $5.00 flat rate is expected
Calculated from verified prices: (2 × $149.99) + (1 × $34.99) + $5.00 shipping = $339.97; verifier.py line 116 confirms this calculation
verifier.py line 120 accepts totals between 334.00 and 345.00

privileged_info_summary: This task creates a phone order for customer Alice Williams (alice.williams@example.com) containing 2 Wireless Headphones (SKU HEADPHONES-001 @ $149.99 each = $299.98) and 1 LED Desk Lamp (SKU LAMP-001 @ $34.99). The order ships to Emily Carter at 456 Magnolia Drive, Portland, Oregon, 97201, using Flat Rate shipping ($5.00) and Check/Money Order payment method, for a grand total of $339.97. All product data and customer information are synthetic, generated via Magento REST API during environment setup.
